prior.example: You need prior experience for this job.
prior.example_zh: 這份工作需要先前的經驗。

proclaim.example: The king proclaimed a national holiday.
proclaim.example_zh: 國王宣布了一個全國假日。

productivity.example_zh: 充足的睡眠能提升生產力。

profile.example_zh: 她更新了線上的個人資料。

profile.example: He drew her profile in pencil.
profile.example_zh: 他用鉛筆畫了她的側臉。

profound.example: The book had a profound effect on me.
profound.example_zh: 這本書對我有深遠的影響。

progressive.example: The school has progressive teaching methods.
progressive.example_zh: 這所學校有先進的教學方法。

projection.example_zh: 這項預測顯示銷售會上升。

prolong.example: Good care can prolong a pet's life.
prolong.example_zh: 良好的照顧能延長寵物的壽命。

prone.example: He is prone to making careless mistakes.

propaganda.example: The poster was a piece of propaganda.
propaganda.example_zh: 那張海報是一則宣傳品。

prophet.example: People believed the words of the prophet.

proportion.example: A large proportion of the class agreed.
proportion.example_zh: 班上有很大比例的人同意。

prosecution.example_zh: 檢方提出了強而有力的證據。

prospect.example: The prospect of a holiday made us happy.
prospect.example_zh: 放假的期待讓我們很開心。

province.example: They moved to a quiet northern province.
province.example_zh: 他們搬到了一個安靜的北方省份。

provision.example: The contract has a special provision.
provision.example_zh: 這份合約有一條特別條款。

provision.example: The provision of clean water is vital.
provision.example_zh: 乾淨水源的供給至關重要。

provoke.example: Don't provoke the dog with a stick.

pulse.example: The nurse checked the patient's pulse.
pulse.example_zh: 護理師量了病人的脈搏。

purchase.example: She made a large purchase at the store.
purchase.example_zh: 她在店裡買了一大筆東西。

pyramid.example: We visited the great pyramid in Egypt.
pyramid.example_zh: 我們參觀了埃及的大金字塔。

qualify.example: She qualified for the final round.
qualify.example_zh: 她取得了進入決賽的資格。

quest.example: He set off on a quest for treasure.

quiver.example_zh: 她的聲音因激動而顫抖。

quota.example: The factory met its monthly quota.
quota.example_zh: 工廠達成了每月的配額。

racism.example: We should all stand against racism.
racism.example_zh: 我們都該反對種族歧視。

rack.example: Hang your coat on the rack.
rack.example_zh: 把你的外套掛在架子上。

radical.example_zh: 他們提出了徹底的改變。

radical.example: The group was led by a young radical.
radical.example_zh: 這個團體由一名年輕的激進份子領導。

ragged.example: The poor man wore ragged clothes.
ragged.example_zh: 那名窮人穿著破爛的衣服。

raid.example: The police carried out a raid at dawn.
raid.example_zh: 警方在黎明時進行了一次突襲。

rail.example: Hold the rail when you go down the stairs.
We traveled across the country by rail.

rally.example_zh: 數千人參加了和平集會。

rally.example: The team rallied to win the game.
rally.example_zh: 球隊重振士氣贏得了比賽。

ranch.example: They raise cattle on a large ranch.
ranch.example_zh: 他們在一座大牧場養牛。

random.example: She picked a random card from the deck.
random.example_zh: 她從牌堆中隨機抽了一張牌。

ratio.example: The ratio of boys to girls is one to one.
ratio.example_zh: 男生和女生的比例是一比一。

rational.example: She made a calm and rational choice.
rational.example_zh: 她做了冷靜而理性的選擇。

rattle.zh: 使咯咯作響、發出嘎嘎聲
rattle.example_zh: 風把窗戶吹得咯咯作響。

rattle.example: The baby shook the rattle happily.

realism.example: The painting is famous for its realism.

realm.example: She is an expert in the realm of science.

rear.example: The exit is at the rear of the bus.

rear.example_zh: 她獨自養大了三個孩子。

reassure.example: He reassured her that all was well.

rebellion.example: The people rose up in rebellion.

recession.example: Many shops closed during the recession.
recession.example_zh: 許多商店在經濟衰退期間倒閉。

recipient.example: She was the recipient of the award.

recite.example: He recited the poem from memory.
recite.example_zh: 他憑記憶背誦了這首詩。

recommend.example: I recommend this book to everyone.

recommendation.example: She gave me a good recommendation.

recruit.example: The team recruited two new players.
recruit.example_zh: 球隊招募了兩名新球員。

refuge.example: They took refuge from the storm in a cave.
refuge.example_zh: 他們躲進山洞避開暴風雨。

regardless.example: She kept trying regardless of the risk.
regardless.example_zh: 不管有多大風險，她仍持續嘗試。

regime.example: The old regime was finally replaced.

rehearsal.example: The band had a rehearsal before the show.
rehearsal.example_zh: 樂團在演出前彩排了一次。

reinforce.example: They reinforced the bridge with steel.
reinforce.example_zh: 他們用鋼材加固了橋梁。

reminder.example: I set a reminder on my phone.
reminder.example_zh: 我在手機上設了一個提醒。

removal.example: The removal of the old tree took hours.
removal.example_zh: 移除那棵老樹花了好幾個小時。

render.example: The injury rendered him unable to walk.

rental.example: The car rental costs fifty dollars a day.

repay.example: He promised to repay the loan soon.
